raw_consumer_statement: In XX/XX/XXXX, I paidXX/XX/XXXX, a {$1500.00} retainer and an additional {$6000.00} for various projects to be completed at my residence at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX, XXXX, XXXX. These projects included specific tasks that were never executed. Despite repeated requests for refunds on the retainer and services unrendered, as well as the return of project funds, XXXX XXXX ceased all communication. She even went as far as disputing several transactions through Citibank, claiming payment for services she never completed. Ultimately, Citibank reversed my disputes in her favor, further exacerbating the situation by closing my account and reporting negative remarks on my credit for the past year. I requested XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX  XXXX, Citi for time to dispute charges related to this and my XXXX XXXX being hacked later in XXXX. Not only did they not remove the charges from my account but I incurred late fees, interest charges and ultimately charge-offs related to balances/ payments not being made, as I refused to pay the vendor for work not completed. After closing the accounts, XXXX XXXX refused to provide online statements and an opportunity to work with their disputes department. They immediately sold the account off and listed derogatory notes on my report. XXXX, XXXX XXXX had similar responses While working on my home, XXXX XXXX engaged several contractors who were not licensed, despite her assurances that they had valid business licenses. When I requested verification of their licensing, itemized receipts for the work performed, and a 1099 form for tax reporting purposes in XXXX, XXXX XXXX failed to respond. My investigation uncovered that her pattern of opening various unlicensed businesses and misrepresenting qualifications may be impacting other individuals in the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX communities. Her actions highlight not only a disregard for legal requirements but also potential harm to others in these communities who may unknowingly engage her services.
